content:
### Kwargs Fix Pipeline

The kwargs verifier errors follow a single causal chain through the compiler pipeline:

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["Python source: print(x, sep='-')"] --> B["Parser: Call with keyword args"]
    B --> C["AST: Call { args: [x], kwargs: [(sep, '-')] }"]
    C --> D["ASTâ†’HIR: Preserve kwargs in HIR Call"]
    D --> E{"HIRâ†’MIR: builtin_extern_map lookup"}
    E -->|kwargs present| F["Emit CallExtern with kwargs as trailing positional"]
    E -->|no kwargs, no args| G["Route to _new variant (R2)"]
    E -->|no kwargs, has args| H["Route to _from_iterable variant"]
    F --> I["Cranelift codegen: declare fn sig with kwargs params"]
    I --> J["JIT: register runtime symbol with matching arity"]
    J --> K["Runtime: mb_print(args, sep, end) executes"]
```

**Root cause**: HIRâ†’MIR strips kwargs before emitting `CallExtern`, but the stripped arg count does not match the runtime function's declared arity. Cranelift verifier rejects the IR.

**Fix**: Two changes in `hir_to_mir.rs`:
1. When kwargs are present, emit them as additional positional args in `CallExtern` (matching runtime signature)
2. Update `builtin_extern_map` entries to include kwargs-aware variants with correct param counts

### Parse Fix Pipeline

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    P1["try: {}['x']"] --> P2{"Parser: stmt context"}
    P2 -->|Current| P3["'{' parsed as block start â†’ parse error"]
    P2 -->|Fixed| P4["'{' parsed as dict/set literal expr â†’ subscript/method â†’ ok"]
    P4 --> P5["except KeyError: handler"]
```

**Root cause**: `expr.rs` does not attempt dict/set literal parsing when `{` appears at statement position inside `try` body.

**Fix**: In `parse_expr_stmt`, try dict/set literal before falling through to block parsing.

### Output Mismatch Fix Routing

No pipeline change â€” fixes are localized to runtime functions:

| Runtime function | Missing feature | Fix |
|-----------------|-----------------|-----|
| `mb_sorted` | `key=`, `reverse=` params | Add optional params, apply key fn before comparison |
| `mb_min` / `mb_max` | `key=`, `default=` params | Add optional params |
| `mb_sum` | `start=` param | Add optional start accumulator |
| `mb_pow` | `mod` third arg | Implement `pow(x, y, mod)` modular exponentiation |
| `mb_int_from_str` | `base` param | Parse with specified radix |
| `mb_chr` / `mb_ord` | Full Unicode range | Handle beyond ASCII |
| `mb_string_format` | Keyword args | Implement `'{name}'.format(name=v)` substitution |
